message:
feat(abi): port 17 _nss_hesiod_* NSS plugin entrypoints (bd-yz9cj)

Close the libnss_hesiod.so.2 surface gap (MIT Project Athena Hesiod
directory service NSS plugin). Returns NSS_STATUS_NOTFOUND + ENOENT
for all lookups (no Hesiod server is configured) and SUCCESS for
session-shape end/set entries.

- _nss_hesiod_endgrent / endpwent / endprotoent / endservent
- _nss_hesiod_setgrent / setpwent / setprotoent / setservent
- _nss_hesiod_getgrnam_r / getpwnam_r / getprotobyname_r
- _nss_hesiod_getgrgid_r / getpwuid_r / getprotobynumber_r
- _nss_hesiod_getservbyname_r (name+proto) / getservbyport_r (port+proto)
- _nss_hesiod_initgroups_dyn

Reuses existing nss_files_end/set_stayopen/get_by_str/get_by_int macros
where the signatures match; declares inline stubs for the (name+proto)
and (port+proto) servent-by-key getters and the seven-arg initgroups_dyn.

+ 7 abi tests covering end/set SUCCESS, get-by-key NOTFOUND+ENOENT,
servent-by-name and servent-by-port pair-key NOTFOUND+ENOENT, and
initgroups_dyn null-tolerance.
